name: Sequenzy Email Automation Agent Capability
description: Allows A2A-capable agents and orchestrators to discover Sequenzy as an email marketing automation tool exposed through MCP.

skills.name: Email marketing automation
skills.description: Manage subscribers, lists, segments, templates, campaigns, sequences, transactional email, analytics, and AI-generated email content.
examples: Create a draft lifecycle email campaign for users who started onboarding but did not finish.
Add this customer to the beta announcements segment.
Show recent email performance for the activation sequence.

sequenzyApiKey.description: Sequenzy API key or OAuth access token.
